tagline: Lake Forest full-service salon on Raymond Way.

hero.eyebrow: LAKE FOREST · RAYMOND WAY · OPEN SEVEN DAYS
hero.heading: A Lake Forest classic — hair and nails under one roof.
hero.subheading: A full-service hair and nail salon inside the Lake Forest Towne Center on Raymond Way. Cuts, color, blowouts, manicures, pedicures, full sets — eight chairs, seven days a week.

about.label: The salon
about.heading: Eight chairs. Lake Forest classic.
paragraphs: Pearl Hair & Nails has been on Raymond Way in Lake Forest since 2014. Eight chairs split between the hair side and the nail side, with a senior stylist on every chair.
We do classic cuts, men's and women's color, balayage, blow-outs, and updos on the hair side. Manicures, pedicures, gel, dip, full sets, and detailed art on the nail side.
Open seven days a week. Walk-ins welcome but appointments preferred for color, balayage, and full sets. Sundays we open later at ten.

services.title: Women's Cut + Blowout
services.description: Wash, cut, and blow-dry. Shoulder-length through long. Forty-five minutes in the chair.

services.title: Color · Single Process
services.description: Single-process color with toner and blow-out. Ninety minutes in the chair. Includes the conditioning.

services.title: Balayage
services.description: Hand-painted highlights with toner and blow-out. Two-and-a-half hours.

services.title: Classic Manicure
services.description: Trim, shape, cuticle work, polish, top coat. The thirty-minute essential.

services.title: Spa Pedicure
services.description: Hot-towel soak, scrub, callus, paraffin, polish. Forty-five minutes of restoration.

services.title: Full Set + Gel
services.description: Acrylic full set with UV-cured gel polish for two-week wear. Seventy-five minutes.

reviews.name: Patricia D.
reviews.text: Pearl is the only salon in Lake Forest that has handled both my color and my nails for the last six years. Same stylist, same chair, same finish. The standing four-thirty Thursday is sacred.

reviews.name: Linda H.
reviews.text: Booked Pearl for my daughter's bridal party of eight. They handled all of us in three hours with color, blowouts, and full sets. The bride cried. Real shop.

reviews.name: Cathy R.
reviews.text: Brought my mom and my fourteen-year-old daughter for a Saturday morning. Two cuts, two pedicures, two manis. Three hours, three hundred dollars, three generations happy.

contact.address: 24602 Raymond Way M, Lake Forest, CA 92630
